question: What is a common data structure used to implement priority queues?
explanation: Linked lists implemented using a heap structure are commonly used to implement priority queues because they allow for efficient access and removal of the highest (or lowest) priority element.

question: Which sorting algorithm has an average and worst-case time complexity of O(n log n)?
explangy: Quick sort is a divide-and-conquer algorithm that, on average and in the worst case (when pivot selection leads to unbalanced partitions), has an O(n log n) time complexity.

question: What is the Big-O notation for searching an element in a balanced binary search tree?
explanation: In a balanced binary search tree, the height is logarithmic with respect to the number of nodes (N), so searching for an element takes O(log n) time.
